text:
付き合いの長いあんたに
今さら細かい説明は必要ないだろう？
要はダーカーを殺すだけのこと。

あいにくアタシは
魚は見るのも食べるのも嫌いでね。
誰かと交代したかったんだ。

生臭いところへ行かせて悪いけど
臭いがつく前に終わ

I doubt you need a long explanation after all
this time. It's simple: kill the Falspawn.

Unfortunately, I abhor eating or even seeing
fish. I had hoped to trade with someone else.

I apologize for sending you somewhere so ripe
with the stink of fish. Try to wrap things up
before the stench clings to you.
